# Hand-written effects (NOT regenerated by scripts/advance_parser.py).

# Registers this mod's settings with the Community Mod Framework's in-game
# menu (Community Mod Menu). Called from cmf_on_mod_registration.
# Setting values are read back with "global_variable_map(cmm|flag:<mod>__<id>)".
rl_cmf_register = {
    # Roll sources
    cmm_register_global_bool_setting = {
        mod_id = europa_survivors
        setting_id = roll_on_research
        tab_id = general
        group_id = sources
        default_value = 1
    }
    cmm_register_global_bool_setting = {
        mod_id = europa_survivors
        setting_id = roll_on_battle
        tab_id = general
        group_id = sources
        default_value = 1
    }
    cmm_register_global_bool_setting = {
        mod_id = europa_survivors
        setting_id = roll_on_new_age
        tab_id = general
        group_id = sources
        default_value = 1
    }
    # Gameplay
    cmm_register_global_bool_setting = {
        mod_id = europa_survivors
        setting_id = enable_reroll
        tab_id = general
        group_id = gameplay
        default_value = 1
    }
    cmm_register_global_bool_setting = {
        mod_id = europa_survivors
        setting_id = enable_cursed
        tab_id = general
        group_id = gameplay
        default_value = 1
    }
}

# rl_pick_three: fill rl_event_1/2/3 with three DISTINCT not-yet-owned advance
# indices. rl_rand_se (generated) picks a random index into rl_event_$v$.
rl_pick_three = {
    rl_rand_se = { v = 1 }

    set_variable = { name = rl_event_2 value = -1 }
    set_variable = { name = rl_event_3 value = -1 }

    while = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                var:rl_event_2 = var:rl_event_1
                var:rl_event_2 = -1
            }
        }
        rl_rand_se = { v = 2 }
    }

    while = {
        limit = {
            OR = {
                var:rl_event_3 = var:rl_event_1
                var:rl_event_3 = var:rl_event_2
                var:rl_event_3 = -1
            }
        }
        rl_rand_se = { v = 3 }
    }
}

# rl_roll_rarity: set rl_rarity to 1 (common), 2 (rare) or 3 (legendary).
rl_roll_rarity = {
    random_list = {
        65 = { set_variable = { name = rl_rarity value = 1 } }
        27 = { set_variable = { name = rl_rarity value = 2 } }
        8  = { set_variable = { name = rl_rarity value = 3 } }
    }
}

# rl_roll_curse: high risk / high reward. Rare and legendary rolls have a chance
# to be cursed (applies a random drawback when any option is taken). Common rolls
# are never cursed. Disabled by the enable_cursed setting.
rl_roll_curse = {
    set_variable = { name = rl_cursed value = 0 }
    if = {
        limit = {
            "global_variable_map(cmm|flag:europa_survivors__enable_cursed)" >= 1
        }
        if = {
            limit = { var:rl_rarity = 3 }
            random_list = {
                50 = { rl_set_curse = yes }
                50 = { }
            }
        }
        else_if = {
            limit = { var:rl_rarity = 2 }
            random_list = {
                20 = { rl_set_curse = yes }
                80 = { }
            }
        }
    }
}

rl_set_curse = {
    set_variable = { name = rl_cursed value = 1 }
    random_list = {
        1 = { set_variable = { name = rl_curse value = 1 } }
        1 = { set_variable = { name = rl_curse value = 2 } }
        1 = { set_variable = { name = rl_curse value = 3 } }
        1 = { set_variable = { name = rl_curse value = 4 } }
        1 = { set_variable = { name = rl_curse value = 5 } }
    }
}

# rl_apply_curse: if the current roll is cursed, apply its drawback. Called by
# every option's effect so any choice carries the curse.
rl_apply_curse = {
    if = {
        limit = { var:rl_cursed = 1 }
        if = { limit = { var:rl_curse = 1 } add_country_modifier = { modifier = modifier_rl_curse_1 years = -1 } }
        else_if = { limit = { var:rl_curse = 2 } add_country_modifier = { modifier = modifier_rl_curse_2 years = -1 } }
        else_if = { limit = { var:rl_curse = 3 } add_country_modifier = { modifier = modifier_rl_curse_3 years = -1 } }
        else_if = { limit = { var:rl_curse = 4 } add_country_modifier = { modifier = modifier_rl_curse_4 years = -1 } }
        else = { add_country_modifier = { modifier = modifier_rl_curse_5 years = -1 } }
    }
}

# rl_do_roll: standard roll (random rarity). Used by research.
rl_do_roll = {
    rl_roll_rarity = yes
    rl_roll_curse = yes
    rl_pick_three = yes
    trigger_event_non_silently = { id = rl_events.1 }
}

# rl_do_roll_legendary: guaranteed legendary roll. Used by new-age milestones.
rl_do_roll_legendary = {
    set_variable = { name = rl_rarity value = 3 }
    rl_roll_curse = yes
    rl_pick_three = yes
    trigger_event_non_silently = { id = rl_events.1 }
}

# rl_do_reroll: replace the three offered options (keeps the current rarity) and
# re-open the event. Spends one banked reroll token.
rl_do_reroll = {
    change_variable = { name = rl_reroll_tokens add = -1 }
    rl_pick_three = yes
    trigger_event_non_silently = { id = rl_events.1 }
}

# rl_grant_reroll_token: award one banked reroll token (capped), the reward for
# winning a great battle. Rerolls are spent on future selection events.
rl_grant_reroll_token = {
    if = {
        limit = { has_variable = rl_reroll_tokens }
        if = {
            limit = { var:rl_reroll_tokens < 10 }
            change_variable = { name = rl_reroll_tokens add = 1 }
        }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { name = rl_reroll_tokens value = 1 }
    }
}

# rl_grant_mod: apply a stripped-advance modifier, scaled by the current rarity
# via the modifier's size (2x rare, 5x legendary). $m$ is the modifier name.
rl_grant_mod = {
    if = {
        limit = { var:rl_rarity = 3 }
        add_country_modifier = { modifier = $m$ years = -1 size = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { var:rl_rarity = 2 }
        add_country_modifier = { modifier = $m$ years = -1 size = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        add_country_modifier = { modifier = $m$ years = -1 size = 1 }
    }
}
